args.code:
import pandas as pd, json
cases = pd.DataFrame(var_call_Rd5Dh78AdK7NSYfPBY4jssac)
accounts = pd.DataFrame(var_call_gFMP1An0qMNAMLEqwUBh7wGW)
for col in ['accountid','Id']:
    if col in cases.columns:
        cases[col] = cases[col].str.lstrip('#')
    if col in accounts.columns:
        accounts[col] = accounts[col].str.lstrip('#')
cases['createddate'] = pd.to_datetime(cases['createddate'])
cases['closeddate'] = pd.to_datetime(cases['closeddate'])
cutoff = pd.Timestamp('2021-10-26') - pd.DateOffset(months=18)
recent = cases[cases['createddate'] >= cutoff]
recent = recent.merge(accounts.rename(columns={'Id':'accountid'}), on='accountid', how='left')
recent['duration_hours'] = (recent['closeddate'] - recent['createddate']).dt.total_seconds() / 3600
state_stats = recent.groupby('state')['duration_hours'].mean().dropna()
fastest_state = state_stats.sort_values().index[0] if not state_stats.empty else None
result = json.dumps(fastest_state)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(result)

args.code:
import pandas as pd, json
cases = pd.DataFrame(var_call_Rd5Dh78AdK7NSYfPBY4jssac)
accounts = pd.DataFrame(var_call_gFMP1An0qMNAMLEqwUBh7wGW)
for col in ['accountid','Id']:
    if col in cases.columns:
        cases[col] = cases[col].astype(str).str.lstrip('#')
    if col in accounts.columns:
        accounts[col] = accounts[col].astype(str).str.lstrip('#')
cases['createddate'] = pd.to_datetime(cases['createddate'])
cases['closeddate'] = pd.to_datetime(cases['closeddate'])
cutoff = pd.to_datetime('2021-10-26').tz_localize('UTC') - pd.DateOffset(months=18)
recent = cases[cases['createddate'] >= cutoff]
recent = recent.merge(accounts.rename(columns={'Id':'accountid'}), on='accountid', how='left')
recent['duration_hours'] = (recent['closeddate'] - recent['createddate']).dt.total_seconds() / 3600
state_stats = recent.groupby('state')['duration_hours'].mean().dropna()
fastest_state = state_stats.sort_values().index[0] if not state_stats.empty else None
result = json.dumps(fastest_state)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(result)

import pandas as pd, json
cases = pd.DataFrame(var_call_Rd5Dh78AdK7NSYfPBY4jssac)
accounts = pd.DataFrame(var_call_gFMP1An0qMNAMLEqwUBh7wGW)
for col in ['accountid','Id']:
    if col in cases.columns:
        cases[col] = cases[col].astype(str).str.lstrip('#')
    if col in accounts.columns:
        accounts[col] = accounts[col].astype(str).str.lstrip('#')
cases['createddate'] = pd.to_datetime(cases['createddate'])
cases['closeddate'] = pd.to_datetime(cases['closeddate'])
cutoff = pd.to_datetime('2021-10-26').tz_localize('UTC') - pd.DateOffset(months=18)
recent = cases[cases['createddate'] >= cutoff]
recent = recent.merge(accounts.rename(columns={'Id':'accountid'}), on='accountid', how='left')
recent['duration_hours'] = (recent['closeddate'] - recent['createddate']).dt.total_seconds() / 3600
state_stats = recent.groupby('state')['duration_hours'].mean().dropna()
fastest_state = state_stats.sort_values().index[0] if not state_stats.empty else None
result = json.dumps(fastest_state)
print("__RESULT__:")
